title: 2026-03-10 TACO Pressure Index Update: Elevated at 28.44
description: Today’s retreat-pressure snapshot for 2026-03-10: the TACO Pressure Index closed at 28.44/100, signaling a elevated pressure regime as volatility and inflation expectations shaped the daily read. See the chart pack, score regime, and what drove the latest reading.
hero_summary: The daily signal helps separate noise from persistent multi-factor stress. On 2026-03-10, the score printed 28.44/100 in the elevated regime, with volatility and inflation expectations doing most of the work.
